title: I Forgot
lyrics:
[opening]
Bus rolls past—*rumble-roar!*
Mom’s keys jingle by the door.
I pat my bag—*gasp*—no more!
Math sheet’s gone—*oh no*—the floor!

Mom: *What now?*

---

[verse 1]
Packed it tight last night!
Right by my lunch—just right!
Now it’s gone—what a fright!
Did it fly out of sight?

Mom: *Why?*

Checked my desk, my chair,
Floor—it’s not there!
Even looked in my hair!
Wait—was it ever there?

Mom: *Really?*

---

[chorus]
I Forgot! I Forgot!
Brain’s a sieve—all shot!
I Forgot! I Forgot!
Homework’s gone—*what a plot!*

---

[verse 2]
Did my dog chew it—*ick*?
Nope, he’s sick.
Wait—left it on the bus—*click!*

Mom: *What?*

Left it there last night,
Or in my shoe—out of sight!
Alien took it—*bright light!*
Or… did I just not write?

Mom: *Enough!*

---

[chorus]
I Forgot! I Forgot!
Brain’s a sieve—all shot!
I Forgot! I Forgot!
Homework’s gone—*what a plot!*

---

[verse 3]
Did it neat—on my hand!
Washed it off—*what a plan!*
Now it’s just… *gone*—so bad!

Mom: *Oh no…*

Teacher’s gonna think I slack,
Or that I rode a Ufo back!
Wait—my lunch is in my snack!
Nope—that’s my shoe—*squishy snack!*

Mom: *Let’s go!*

---

[chorus]
I Forgot… I forgot…
Brain’s a… *yawn*… sieve…
I forgot… *stretch*… forgot…
Homework’s… *snore*… zzz…

Paper drops—*plop*—the floor.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, acoustic guitar and snare, 114 BPM, strong bass, punchy beat, bouncy groovy infectious singalong, impossible to sit still, makes you move
scene: The school bus rumbles past the living room window at 7:47 AM, Mom’s hand already on the doorknob—then you pat your empty backpack pocket and whisper, *"I forgot my math homework"* as the permission slip flutters to the floor.
cover_description: Kid frozen mid-panic as homework drifts down like a leaf.
rhyme_family: hot, spot, lot, not, knot, pot, rot, dot, got, cot, plot, shot, slot, trot, squat, what, yacht, caught, taught, ought
